headline: FY2026 20-F: rev $4.92B (+23%) but ~30.5% is related-party (SoftBank/Arm China) growing +82%; NEW pivot to production silicon (Arm AGI CPU); SoftBank 86.4% control + $8.5B share-pledge margin loan; Qualcomm/Nuvia JMOL loss on appeal, Case 2 trial Q4-CY2026; auditor Deloitte, prior material weakness remediated, no restatement.
